title: Draft the cyber DDQ answer from the evidence
guidance: Reward an answer that addresses the exact question from the evidence given, concisely and in a credible institutional voice.

runner_input.instruction: Draft the answer to the LP question using only the evidence provided.
runner_input.constraints: Output: prose only, max 120 words. No headings, no bullets.

source_blocks.text: LP question: Describe the firm's information-security posture and any incident history.

items: Cyber Essentials Plus certified; annual third-party penetration test
One phishing incident in 2024, contained within 24h, no data loss; post-incident review completed
MFA and SSO enforced; SOC 2 not yet held, targeted for 2026

rubric_notes: Must cover posture + incident history honestly, including that SOC 2 is targeted not held, and the 2024 incident was contained.
